summary: Clarified that the chapter opens on the night after the blank-ledger beat in chapter 02 and tightened the closing aftermath so the diesel, bench ache, and fragmented sleep hand directly into chapter 04.
edits: Anchored the opening as the following night and tied Tomas's ledger work to the line he left blank in the prior chapter.
Adjusted the wash-up beat so the residual diesel, bench soreness, and scrap sleep align with the next chapter's opening condition.
